title: begonia nahangensis
intro: Begonia nahangensis, also known as Nahang Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Vietnamese folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The roots of Begonia nahangensis contain various compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Begonia nahangensis is often combined with other medicinal plants to create teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
